experiment_card.research_question: Can a chunked/source-grounded LLM method produce a complete parseable source-grounding artifact when using DeepSeek V4 Pro and a smaller output contract, and what does it preserve or lose compared with the long-context judgment pilot?
experiment_card.hypothesis: On the same source excerpt and benchmark as long_context_judgment_live_pilot_001 and chunked_source_grounding_live_pilot_001, DeepSeek V4 Pro plus a smaller output contract may avoid the output_contract_too_large failure while preserving source-grounding value for later comparison.
experiment_card.evaluation_plan: Validate this proposed ExperimentCard and MethodCard against protocol schemas. After a separately authorized live run, create proposal-only export records and evaluate whether the artifact is complete, parseable, source-grounded, and useful for comparison against long_context_judgment_live_pilot_001 and chunked_source_grounding_live_pilot_001. Method quality, trading validity, product readiness, strategy evidence, graduation, and architecture are not evaluated by this planning packet.
